---
title: "Diego Chuquimia: Data Science Portfolio"
subtitle: "Using R, SQL, Python, Power BI, and Excel to analyze data and build business insights"
---

## How to navigate this portfolio?

Use the top menu to navigate to my resume, project sections, and specific work samples. Each section highlights projects created with different tools, including R, SQL, Python, Power BI, and Excel.

## [My Resume](resume.qmd)

This section contains my education, experience, technical skills, and professional background.

## [Projects](projects.qmd)

This section gives an overview of my data analytics, finance, and business intelligence projects.

## Project Areas

### [R Projects](Projects/R/apartment_price_analysis.qmd)

Projects using R, tidyverse, ggplot2, Quarto, maps, and statistical analysis.

### [SQL Projects](Projects/SQL/airbnb_profitability.qmd)

Projects using SQL to clean, summarize, and analyze business and financial data.

### [Python Projects](Projects/Python/student_housing_recommender.qmd)

Projects using Python, pandas, NumPy, and data analysis workflows.

### [Power BI Projects](Projects/PowerBI/financial_dashboard.qmd)

Dashboards and reports built with Power BI.

### [Excel Projects](Projects/Excel/budget_vs_actual.qmd)

Excel projects using formulas, PivotTables, dashboards, and financial reports.
